text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's finally the morning of the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Where's all your confidence gone? Shouldn't you
be going on about how cool you are?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heh, right back at you. Shouldn't you be spouting
off about how you're number one?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: My performance today will speak for itself. I am number one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Both you and the audience would do well to
remember that.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Haha. Those are some bold words.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But we can agree on one thing. We'll do our
talkin' on the track today. And I'm gonna run
straight past ya.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I should say the same to you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay, breathe in, breathe out... Here we go. The
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, who do you think you're talking to,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm Daiwa Scarlet, the number one Umamusume!
I'll never lose to anyone!
